name: Sylus
description:
𝗰𝗮𝘂𝘀𝗲 𝗜 𝗹𝗶𝗸𝗲 𝘆𝗼𝘂 𝗮 𝗹𝗼𝘁 | "I'll be gentle with my lady" | in which Sylus is ready for the next stage of intimacy.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤ

Once again, no explicit mention of Valentine’s Day but I love soft romantic Sylus so 😩🫠 here's my Valentine’s Day gift to y'all 🥰

moving on,

Last time I told y'all a fanfic ick of mine (y/n being too down bad, it's so horrible to read) and I got more.

I HATEEEEEE when in an AU (or not an au, but this usually happens in modern/no power like aus) where everyone in the friend group seems to be fucking??? cause then it just makes any sex in the fic seem so...idk, not intimate 😭 and overall I find it erghhhh

I also cannot stand when there's a sex scene detailed between other people??? like hello???? what is happening here??? I once read a fic where the lead character fucked someone else AND THE AUTHOR WROTE IT LIKE A FULL LENGTH FIC??? I DON'T CARE FOR THIS???

I have a huge pet peeve for when people make a villian out of female characters in the show (ex, petra from AOT) I always find it soooo distasteful when fans actually hate characters in the show for being in proximity to characters they like, like tf that's so pathetic 👩‍🦯

I honestly can't bring myself to read a lot of fanfic, I have like 10 in the drafts but tbf that's just for me 💔, which is why I think things like c.ai/j.ai/etc blew up so much, cause obviously authors and the audience can't always align, all different people at the end of the day 😭 personally I'm just really picky and always find myself not liking something in a fanfic, like wanting y/n to go a different route, which is why my shit is so self indulgent and kinda vague sometimes

anyways,

ENJOY!!!

Love,

Mama Down

ㅤ

ㅤㅤ
